description: The on-chain brain for autonomous AI agents — an MCP server for cross-chain routing (LiFi + deBridge), smart-contract ABI decoding, portfolio & allowance management, EIP-1559 gas/profit estimation, anti-rug security scanning (GoPlus, EVM + Solana) and MEV protection. Keystore-free: returns only unsigned transactions for the agent to sign.
rules: Crypto-Knowledge is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server. Connect over stdio (npx) or Streamable HTTP (POST /mcp).
It is keystore-free: it never holds private keys and returns unsigned transactions; the calling agent signs them.
Tools: route, pumpfun, profitability, abi, portfolio, security, mev_protection.
Provider modes per call: open (public RPC), own_key (bring your own Helius/Alchemy key, recommended), tool (operator key, gated).
Supported chains: Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Cronos, ApeChain, Solana.
